name: YardSnaps
pain_points: Built on Wix — template-based, limited customization, feels generic
No online booking/scheduling integration — just a basic contact form
No Google Reviews widget or social proof beyond 3 manually added testimonials
No clear service area page or local SEO optimization for Douglasville
Design feels dated — low-res images, inconsistent typography, all-caps text blocks
No mobile-first design cues — Wix responsive mode often breaks on smaller screens
Missing phone number CTA in sticky header for mobile users
No pricing transparency beyond vague cost ranges
No before/after project gallery — only small thumbnails
notes: Wix site with basic contact form. Landscape design niche (not lawn care/maintenance). 3 testimonials manually added. Phone number visible but not sticky. Design options are well-organized but presentation is dated. Good candidate for a modern redesign.

name: Advent Lawn Care
pain_points: Built on UENI — extremely basic template builder, very limited functionality
Only 5 reviews shown on-site despite 135 Google Reviews — massive missed opportunity
No contact form whatsoever — 'Get a Free Estimate' button is just a tel: link
No online booking or scheduling capability
No service pages — all services mentioned in a single paragraph
No project photos or before/after gallery
No testimonials section with real customer quotes
Generic stock imagery instead of real work photos
No local SEO content — no mention of specific service areas beyond Douglasville
Accessibility overlay widget (often considered harmful for actual accessibility)
No blog, no FAQ, no educational content for SEO
Footer links to 'Merchant Policies' and 'Legal Notice' — very template-looking
notes: Extremely bare-bones UENI template site. Services include mowing, mulching, cleanups, weed control, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, junk removal. 135 Google Reviews at 4.9 stars is excellent but website does zero justice to the business. No forms, no booking, no real photos. Perfect Build candidate — strong reviews, terrible web presence.

name: GrassRoots Turf
pain_points: Page title is excessively keyword-stuffed — terrible for UX and looks spammy
Some content repetition across sections
Typo: 'quesitons' in FAQ heading
Very long page — could benefit from better content hierarchy
notes: Professional WordPress site with strong SEO, embedded Google Reviews widget (167 reviews at 4.9), franchise model, Weed-Free Guarantee, multiple CTAs, FAQ section, local SEO pages for surrounding cities, blog, client login portal, referral program. This is a well-run operation with a solid web presence. Not a lead — they have their act together.

name: Best Rate Landscape
pain_points: Website is completely DOWN — DNS resolution error (Cloudflare Error 1001)
Domain not resolving — either expired, misconfigured, or abandoned
HTTP only (no HTTPS) — indicates neglect even before the DNS failure
Only 14 reviews — low volume
No web presence at all currently
notes: Website is completely dead — DNS resolution error. Domain appears abandoned or misconfigured. 5.0 stars but only 14 reviews. This business has zero functional web presence. Strong Build candidate if they are still operating.

name: Carter Landscaping
pain_points: No website at all
Zero online presence beyond Google listing
No way for customers to learn about services, see work, or request quotes online
